item.fpscompress.prefab_upgrade_template: Right-click a Compact Machine to convert it to a PreFab
fpscompress.message.not_compact_machine: This only works on Compact Machines!
fpscompress.message.needs_upgrade: This machine needs a PreFab Upgrade Template first!
fpscompress.message.already_cached: Machine is already running in cached mode!
fpscompress.prefab.entry_blocked: PreFab is active! Only creative mode players can enter during operation.
fpscompress.config.minimum_simulation_ti: Minimum time in SIMULATING state before survival players can finish (0=disabled). Creative mode bypasses this. 20 ticks = 1 second.
fpscompress.gui.simulation.button.finish: Minimum simulation time not reached (%s remaining)
fpscompress.configuration.title: FPSCompress Configuration
fpscompress.importer.frequency.none: None (right-click with item to set frequency)

patchouli.book.fpscompress.name: FPSCompress Guide
patchouli.book.fpscompress.landing_text: A comprehensive guide to factory compression and virtual production. Learn how to build efficient factories inside Compact Machines and run them without chunk loading!
